root_cause: Data center power failure (Flexential PDX-04) — cascading breaker failure caused total power loss to control plane infrastructure

timeline_events.event: PDX-04 data center lost power; breakers failed to fail over
Decision made to fail over to European disaster recovery sites
Most control plane services restored at DR facility

action_items: Implement Code Orange: shift engineering focus to reliability
Remove dependencies on core data centers for control plane configuration
